response.justification: Bogdan possesses an impressive background with deep experience in high-throughput systems and highly relevant recent work in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators. His Staff-level experience and ownership mindset align well with the technical strategy and architectural responsibilities of the role. However, the complete absence of Python on his resume is a major concern, as it is explicitly listed as a must-have technical skill. He is recommended as a 'maybe' to determine if his exceptional AI-native environment exposure outweighs the need for immediate Python mastery.
strengths: Direct experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators.
Proven track record designing high-throughput distributed systems handling millions of requests per second.
Strong technical leadership background with a demonstrated ownership mindset as a founder and Staff Engineer.
concerns: Complete lack of Python experience, which is a must-have technical requirement for the role.
Past high-performance systems experience relies heavily on DLang rather than mainstream enterprise languages.
No explicit mention of participating in out-of-hours on-call rotations or incident response.
